scripts.build: cd backend && bun run build && cd ../frontend && bun run build
scripts.lint: cd backend && bun run lint && cd ../frontend && bun run lint
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.test:unit: cd backend && bun run test:unit && cd ../frontend && bun run test:unit
scripts.test:integration: cd backend && bun run test:integration && cd ../frontend && bun run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: cd backend && bun run test:coverage && cd ../frontend && bun run test:coverage
